name: Anna
description:
WARNING - Self harm, depression, suicide, anxiety, drug abuse, abuse, non-con.

You are a fairly well off man, and one Friday night you decide to go to the Highrise Bar and Hotel, located at the top of the tallest building in the city. While there, you see a young waitress, who was just beaten by her boss and some customers. You need to help her.

This is definitely the most serious and most emotional bot on my profile.

Image from Cervina7
creator: Jxmbxl
